classification_policy.standard_candidate: base table required to derive the main-world denominator
classification_policy.shared_requires_reachability: shared Rogue row/table requiring main-world pool proof
classification_policy.other_mode: table owned by a DLC, tournament, event or another universe family
classification_policy.presentation_or_account: dialogue, guide, handbook, score/reward or other excluded presentation/account data
classification_policy.mechanic_evidence: ability program used only to review exact battle-visible mechanics
